title: In Spring
overview: Kyiv, 1929. Shots of the city as it wakes up... its awakening echoes with the lyrical pictures of the rebirth of nature. Kaufman’s attentive camera pauses for a long time on the smiling faces of children, painting a lyrical picture, a confession of love for Kyiv.

trailers.title: "In Spring" (1929) Mikhail Kaufman. Ukrainian Silent Film. Music by Misha Kalinin & Roksana Smirnova
